text.title: vui-privacy-security Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns repeatedly observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Device records without LED or chime; user complains; CNIL fines €X.
antipattern.fix: Mandate visual + audio indicators; document on packaging + onboarding.

antipattern.symptom: User says 'pay $500'; bot pays without second factor. Spoof attack possible.
antipattern.fix: Require PIN / biometric on every sensitive action.

antipattern.symptom: Raw transcripts with SSNs hit 3rd-party LLM logs; subpoena exposes them.
antipattern.fix: Add on-device redaction (regex + NER) before transmission.

antipattern.symptom: Transcripts retained forever; user requests deletion; vendor cannot identify all copies.
antipattern.fix: Set ≤30-day retention for non-essential; expose 'delete my voice history' control.
